items.title: SK Hynix’s $26.5 billion US listing brought to Telegram users via xStocks
items.whyYouShouldCare: SK Hynix's US listing via xStocks could enhance Solana's visibility and attract institutional interest, potentially boosting liquidity and ecosystem growth.

items.title: Phantom pulls on-chain perps into the US wallet war ahead of July 9 deadline
items.whyYouShouldCare: Phantom's entry into the US wallet market highlights competitive dynamics that could influence user adoption and transaction volume on the Solana network.

items.title: The Sun Rises in Seoul and Trades on Solana: $SKHY is Now Live
items.whyYouShouldCare: $SKHY trading on Solana signifies expanding use cases for the blockchain, which may drive increased activity and engagement within the ecosystem.
